description: Configure a NextGen Connect channel named 'Registration_Pipeline' to act as a transactional guard for HL7 ADT messages received on TCP port 6665 (MLLP). The channel must insert the Visit Number (PV1.19) and Patient Name (PID.5) into the 'billing_log' table in the PostgreSQL database (jdbc:postgresql://nextgen-postgres:5432/mirthdb, credentials: postgres/postgres). The raw HL7 message must be written to /tmp/billing_out/ only upon a successful database insertion. If the database operation fails, no file should be created, ensuring no orphaned files are generated for failed database records.
